_comment: Example custom blueprint for the Voxta Minecraft Companion
_instructions: Drop .json blueprint files in this blueprints/ folder.
Restart the bot to load them.
Then say 'build a <name>' to build the structure.
'floor_patch' - only placed if the ground has a hole (checked at build time)
'wall' - uses the wall material priority chain (cobblestone > planks > dirt)
'roof' - uses the roof material priority chain (planks > cobblestone > dirt)
'interior' - uses the exact block specified (no substitution, skipped if not in inventory)
Build order is automatic - blocks are sorted: floor_patch → wall (by Y level) → roof → interior
If 'role' is omitted, defaults to 'wall' (material substitution applies)
Height limit: the bot can build up to ~4 blocks high from ground level.
Taller structures will have unreachable blocks.
Coordinates: dx/dz are horizontal offsets from the origin (front-left corner).
dy is the vertical offset (0 = ground level).
